message:
🌱 Add Copilot workflow helpers for auto-assign and AI fix (#49)

Add four workflow helpers from kubestellar/console to enable Copilot
coding agent automation:

- ai-fix.yml: Triggers Copilot on ai-fix-requested label or manual dispatch
- assignment-helper.yml: Enables /assign self-assignment via comments
- add-help-wanted.yml: Auto-adds help-wanted label
- copilot-setup-steps.yml: Pre-configures Copilot agent VM (Node 22)

These enable the existing auto-qa issues (with ai-fix-requested labels)
to be automatically picked up and worked by Copilot.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+name: Add Help Wanted Label
+
+on:
+  issues:
+    types: [labeled]
+
+permissions:
+  issues: write
+
+jobs:
+  label:
+    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-add-help-wanted.yml@main
+    secrets: inherit

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+name: AI Fix with Copilot
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      issue_number:
+        description: Issue number to assign to Copilot
+        required: true
+        type: string
+  issues:
+    types: [labeled]
+  pull_request_target:
+    types: [opened]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+  issues: write
+  pull-requests: write
+
+jobs:
+  ai-fix:
+    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-ai-fix.yml@main
+    with:
+      issue_number: ${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}
+    secrets:
+      token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+name: Assignment Helper
+
+on:
+  issue_comment:
+    types: [created]
+
+permissions:
+  issues: write
+
+jobs:
+  assignment-helper:
+    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-assignment-helper.yml@main

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+name: Copilot Setup Steps
+# Pre-configures the Copilot coding agent's Ubuntu VM with build tools.
+# The agent can then run: npm run build, npm run lint, npx tsc --noEmit, etc.
+
+on: workflow_dispatch
+
+jobs:
+  copilot-setup-steps:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js 22
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+
+      - name: Install server dependencies
+        working-directory: server
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Build server
+        working-directory: server
+        run: npx tsc --noEmit
+
+      - name: Install web dependencies
+        working-directory: web
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Build web
+        working-directory: web
+        run: npx tsc && npx vite build
